description: Universal web scraper with link discovery and depth control. | 通用网页爬虫，支持链接发现和深度控制。

properties.title: 起始 URL | Starting URLs
properties.name: url
properties.description: 要爬取的起始 URL 列表 | List of starting URLs to crawl

properties.title: 最大爬取深度 | Max Depth
properties.name: maxCrawlingDepth
properties.description: 从起始 URL 开始的最大爬取深度（起始页面深度为 0）| Maximum crawl depth from starting URLs (starting page = depth 0)

properties.title: 最大页面数 | Max Pages
properties.name: maxPagesPerCrawl
properties.description: 每次运行最多爬取的页面数量（0 表示不限制）| Maximum pages to crawl per run (0 = unlimited)

properties.title: 页面加载超时 | Page Timeout (secs)
properties.name: pageLoadTimeoutSecs
properties.description: 页面加载的最长等待时间（秒）| Maximum time to wait for page load (seconds)

properties.title: 等待条件 | Wait Condition
properties.name: waitUntil
properties.description: 页面导航完成条件 | Navigation completion condition

options.label: DOM Content Loaded | DOM加载完成
Network Idle 0 | 网络空闲0连接
Network Idle 2 | 网络空闲2连接

properties.title: 注入 jQuery | Inject jQuery
properties.name: injectJQuery
properties.description: 是否在每个页面注入 jQuery 库 | Inject jQuery library into each page

properties.title: 忽略 SSL 错误 | Ignore SSL Errors
properties.name: ignoreSslErrors
properties.description: 是否忽略 SSL 证书错误 | Ignore SSL certificate errors

properties.title: 下载媒体资源 | Download Media
properties.name: downloadMedia
properties.description: 是否下载图片、视频等媒体资源（关闭可提高速度）| Download images, videos and other media (disable for faster crawling)

properties.title: 下载 CSS | Download CSS
properties.name: downloadCss
properties.description: 是否下载 CSS 样式表（关闭可提高速度）| Download CSS stylesheets (disable for faster crawling)

properties.title: 调试日志 | Debug Log
properties.name: debugLog
properties.description: 是否输出详细的调试日志 | Enable detailed debug logging
